# Sync daemon one-cycle workflow through the real CLI and fake cloud server.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec pinax cloud login --endpoint $PINAX_FAKE_CLOUD_URL --workspace ws_123 --device dev_laptop --secret-ref env://PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"cloud.login"'
! stdout 'PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN'
! stdout 'Authorization'

exec pinax sync daemon status --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.daemon.status"'
stdout '"daemon_status":"stopped"'

exec pinax sync daemon run --once --target cloud --poll-interval 10ms --sync-timeout 5s --vault vault --yes --json
stdout '"command":"sync.daemon.run"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
! stdout 'Authorization'
! stdout 'PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN'

exec pinax sync daemon status --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.daemon.status"'
stdout '"daemon_status":"stopped"'

exec pinax sync daemon logs --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"sync.daemon.logs"'
stdout 'started'
! stdout 'Authorization'
! stdout 'PINAX_CLOUD_TOKEN'
-- vault/notes/daemon.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_daemon
title: Daemon
kind: reference
---

# Daemon

daemon body must stay local
